description_long: This is a compact, box-shaped 3D printer with a matte black exterior and rounded edges, featuring a prominent open front for easy access to the print bed. The front panel is accented by a subtle purple LED outline, a small digital display, a rotary knob, and several warning labels. The left side reveals a large window for visibility and a yellow filament feeding into the print head, while the right side is mostly solid with another window. The rear of the printer houses a circular filament spool holder, a visible filament spool, and power/data ports. The print bed is centrally located and clearly visible through the open front and side windows, designed for medium-sized prints. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for desktop or workshop environments.
description: A modern, boxy black 3D printer with a visible print bed, front control panel, and rear-mounted filament spool. Features open windows for visibility and a sleek, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open print chamber, print bed, purple LED outline, control panel with display and knob, and warning labels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open window, yellow filament entering the print head, and partial view of the filament spool at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the circular filament spool holder, yellow filament spool, and power/data ports.
description_view_3: Right side view with a large open window and the filament feeding from the rear spool into the print head.
attribute_control_panel_design: Located on the lower right of the front face, the control panel features a small rectangular digital display, a rotary knob, and several colored labels or buttons.
attribute_filament_spool_holder: A circular, integrated spool holder is mounted externally on the rear left side, holding a yellow filament spool that feeds into the printer.
attribute_print_bed_visibility: The print bed is clearly visible through the open front and side windows; it is flat, rectangular, and centrally positioned.
attribute_power_cable_placement: Power and data ports are visible on the lower left of the rear panel; no cable is attached in the images, but the ports are clearly marked.
